Enabling AI
$NAO Staking
is NOW LIVE

AI infrastructure encompasses the hardware, software, and networking elements that empower industries to effectively develop. Stake $NAO to earn , deploy, and manage artificial intelligence (AI) projects in decentralized way.

STAKE $NAOCLAIM $NAO

About
Nettensor

Nettensor is an AI Infrastructure service provider that emphasizes ease of access and other additional features such as Privacy Service and App Chain which are our best products in blockchain and decentralized industry.

AI INFRASTRUCTURE

AI Infrastructure is one of our flagship products to support the Machine Learning industry and the Blockchain industry and the products we offer including :
NetCloud which offers VPS, RDP and Domain.
NetGPU which offers GPU computing with Cloud to run AI applications.
Nettensor is committed to developing this flagship product in order to compete in the AI Infrastructure business.

PRIVACY SERVICE

Privacy is paramount on the internet and Nettensor is also committed to providing our flagship privacy product NetVPN which can be purchased using $NAO tokens and serves as protection while surfing the internet.
Nettensor is also committed to providing other Privacy services in the future.

AI APP CHAIN

The blockchain network is a major milestone in the blockchain industry so we have done a long research on the App Chain network which is useful for providing services to blockchain users especially the integration of AI on the blockchain and Net Tensor is our App Chain product which is integrated with many LLMs such as Hugging Face, GPT-4 and decentralized LLMs such as bittensor.
Net Tensor is also equipped with compatibility with EVM Bytecode which we call NetVM and infused with Polygon CDK to make it easier for developers to build applications on Net Tensor.

Our Infrastructure

NetGPU

NetGPU accelerates machine learning training, AI, rendering, and cloud gaming with decentralized way. NetGPU provide GPUs optimized Deep Learning Training , AI Inference , Rendering and Cloud Gaming using NVIDIA A100 & H100 for LLM Inference and L40 for Rendering. NetGPU also ideal for AI Frameworks such as TensorFlow , PyTorch , Keras , TensorRT , Hugging Face and Jupyter.

NetCloud

NetCloud offers virtual instances for personal and enterprise projects. NetCloud is suitable for Website, Software Test, Game Server and other instance purposes Provides many servers available in many countries for high flexibility of use and purpose.

NetTensor

Net Tensor is our App Chain product which is integrated with many LLMs such as Hugging Face, GPT-4 and decentralized LLMs such as bittensor. Net Tensor is also equipped with compatibility with EVM Bytecode which we call NetVM and infused with Polygon CDK to make it easier for developers to build applications on Net Tensor.

NetVPN

We have NetVPN to further protect the internet users . NetVPN breaks down the barriers of internet censorship, allowing you to access restricted online content. NetVPN which can be purchased using $NAO tokens and serves as protection while surfing the internet.
